title: Builders Academy
description: Minecraft Modpack that can be used anywhere
body:
# **Builders Academy**

![mc.buildersacademy.net](https://imgur.com/0c54pG9.png)

## Available
![Fabric](https://i.imgur.com/vKbpWCZ.png)

## Version
> **1.20.4** Fabric

## Description

> Builders Academy Modpack is designed for anyone who wants to take their Minecraft building skills to the next level. This modpack brings together a powerful collection of tools and resources, making it easier to create stunning structures and explore new design possibilities. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced builder.

## Why download Builders Academy Modpack? 
> If you're passionate about Minecraft building and want to enhance your creativity, this modpack provides the perfect **mix** of practical tools and educational resources. Join our community of builders and bring your visions to life!

## How do I download it?
1. Look for the search icon `🔍` on your **Modrinth**.
2. Stay in the category called `Modpacks`.
3. Search `Builders Academy` and install it.

## Mods
- Axiom
- Chat Heads
- Cloth Config API
- Dynamic FPS
- Dynamic Lights
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Freecam
- Hold That Chunk
- Iris Shaders
- More Chat History
- Nvidium
- Pick Block Pro
- Puzzle
- ReplayMod
- Server Pinger Fixer
- Sodium
- WorldEdit CUI

## Shaders
- Super Duper Vanilla
- Solas Shader
- Hysteria Shaders
